_comment: RI Canon Opportunity: Heng Yue Sect Destruction. Canon event: Teng Huayuan destroys Heng Yue Sect; Wang Lin swears revenge. Per user directive: every canon event must be accessible in-game.
name: Heng Yue Sect Destruction
canon_event: Teng Huayuan destroys Heng Yue Sect; Wang Lin swears revenge
why_untaken: The destruction is a canon event; the ruins remain for the player to explore.
natural_next_event: The sect falls into ruin; treasures scatter; survivors flee.

karmic_weight.description: Wang Lin's massacre of the Teng Family creates a blood-karma that follows him through the Sea of Devils

consequences.description: Wang Lin's personality locks to Ruthless/Dao of Slaughter
Xu Liqing notices Wang Lin's ruthlessness and recruits him
